title: Fig. 3 in Ventral dermatitis in rowi (Apteryx rowi) due to cutaneous larval migrans
author: Gartrell, B.D.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 3. PCR product from amplification of tissue samples from rowi with cutaneous larval migrans using nematode specific primers NC1 and NC2, separated and visualised on a 1% agarose gel. Lane 1 is the ladder, lanes 2–6 contain rowi samples, lane 7 is a control using LD plasmid, lane 8 is a positive control using a nematode (Haemonchus contortus), and lane 9 contains a negative water control.
steps_raw: Fig. 3. PCR product from amplification of tissue samples from rowi with cutaneous larval migrans using nematode specific primers NC1 and NC2, separated and visualised on a 1% agarose gel. Lane 1 is the ladder, lanes 2–6 contain rowi samples, lane 7 is a control using LD plasmid, lane 8 is a positive control using a nematode (Haemonchus contortus), and lane 9 contains a negative water control.
